title: Formula column as Due Date
excerpt: Hi! I made an automation where it creates subitems and has the date created column. I added the formula column to set my due date for all subitems 2 days after it was created. Is there a way to automate my formula column…

posts.author: Carla22 (Carla22)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I made an automation where it creates subitems and has the date created column. I added the formula column to set my due date for all subitems 2 days after it was created. Is there a way to automate my formula column (due date) to notify me when the date is approaching? Or is there a way to set my formula column as a deadline?
